case_title: KALPESHKUMAR GOHIL VS. JUNE SUZANNE DAMEN ET AL

docket_entries.description: SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD, CASE SETTLED. THE PARTIES ENTER INTO A SIGNED AGREEMENT, WHICH WAS FILED. THE TRIAL DATE OF APRIL 11, 2016 IS VACATED . (501/JPT)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOHIL, KALPESHKUMAR DBA ADMIRAL HOTEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAMEN, JUNE SUZANNE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 608 O'FARRELL STREET SAN FRANCISCO CA 94109 - UNIT 55, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT

Judge Pro Tem: , Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Kaleshkumar Gohil is present in Pro Per.
Defendant June Damen is present.
Attorney Tom Elke appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem , litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of April 11, 2016 is vacated. (501/jpt)
